tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_worker_spaw: Swarm workers don't fight. They silently collect everything of value and carry it back to the Hive.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_scrap: Fragments of biomechanical construction. The Swarm produces no waste — every piece serves a purpose. We haven't figured out which one yet.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_credit: A shimmering token of extraterrestrial mint. Who built this black market is unknown. The important thing is that it works.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_dust: Radioactive dust from fractured veins. Do not touch without protection. Prolonged exposure is inadvisable.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_rod: A compressed uranium rod. The Swarm found a use for it long before we did.
tooltip.alien-invasion.xenocrystal: Clear as a tear and sharp as a sting. The Swarm uses it instead of glass, silicon — instead of everything.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_fiber: Organic matter from alien tissue. Warm to the touch. Don't think about it — just use it.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_core: A pulsing core with the surface temperature of a star. One wrong move and you'll know what a comet feels like.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_plate: A metal that shouldn't exist in such quantities. The Swarm brought it with them.
tooltip.alien-invasion.dark_matter_shard: A fragment of something that doesn't reflect light. It shouldn't exist by the laws of physics — yet here it is, in your hands.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_sword: A reliable uranium alloy blade. Heavy, but it never lets you down.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_pickaxe: A uranium pickaxe — fast and durable. Mid-tier, but earned.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_axe: Works well on enemies and wood alike. Tested.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_shovel: Digs fast. Doesn't fear stone, much less soil.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_hoe: Tills the land well enough to survive on.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_sword: A blade of compressed plasma. Fire doesn't touch it — it is fire.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_pickaxe: Plasma melts rock before steel can strike. Very fast mining.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_shovel: A superheated blade passes through soil without effort.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_hoe: Tills a field in one sweep. Fire-resistant, like all plasma gear.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_sword: Iridium doesn't break. That's the most important thing to know about this sword.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_pickaxe: Mines almost anything. Top tier — justifiably.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_axe: Ultra-durable axe. High damage, long service life.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_shovel: Bites into the ground instantly. Iridium knows no resistance.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_hoe: Tills the land at the highest tier. Nothing more reliable.
tooltip.alien-invasion.toxic_water_bucke: A liquid that corrodes everything living. Place with care — and keep away from yourself.
tooltip.alien-invasion.geiger_counter: Ticks more anxiously than you'd like. But it's better to know than not to know.
tooltip.alien-invasion.portable_purifier: Cleanses infested blocks within arm's reach. Slowly. But it's better than nothing.
tooltip.alien-invasion.rad_pills: You can't feel radiation — but you can take this pill. Clears accumulated irradiation completely.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_filter_mask: A dual-layer organic filter. The air outside isn't what it used to be. This mask remembers that.
tooltip.alien-invasion.contaminated_food: Food touched by Swarm spores. It feeds you. But something changes a little with every bite.
tooltip.alien-invasion.purified_water_fl: Clean water has become rare. This flask is a small reminder of the world before the invasion.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_bolt: A stabilized plasma clot. The Swarm hurls them like stones.
tooltip.alien-invasion.pure_radiation_bl: Radiation Crystal Ore. Rapidly fills the Irradiation bar on approach. Aliens are immune. Drops a radiation crystal.
tooltip.alien-invasion.radiation_crystal: In theory, a single crystal like this could power an entire city. Here, it simply kills slowly.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_chunk: The coal vein has changed. Beneath the black dust — something white and dense. The Swarm rewrote geology.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_chunk: The copper ore has transformed. Something in the Swarm's biomass catalyzes metal substitution.
tooltip.alien-invasion.raw_platinum: Unrefined metal with traces of alien biomass. It needs a blast furnace — then it becomes clean.
tooltip.alien-invasion.raw_palladium: Unrefined material carrying traces of infection. Smelt it and it becomes something useful.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_ingot: Refined platinum. Combined with palladium it forms an alloy second in hardness only to madness.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_ingot: A rare metal — now mined right here. The Swarm handled the supply itself.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_ingot: Nibirium — an alloy with no earthly equivalent. Neither heat nor the Swarm's acid can touch it.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_skin: Skinning an alien is unpleasant work. But it protects better than it looks.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_ore: Since the Swarm arrived, coal veins have changed beyond recognition. Something foreign hides beneath the surface.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_ore: Copper ore coated in something unlike anything terrestrial. The Swarm redesigned geology for itself.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_flesh: The iron ore dissolved. In its place — pulsing biomass. Handle carefully.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_diamond_: The diamond survived. But something has grown through the crystal lattice. Be careful when mining.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_lapis_or: Lapis darkened from within. The Swarm uses it for something we haven't figured out yet.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_redstone: Redstone still works — but now it's strangely warm to the touch.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_helm: Sewn from alien hide — the material that knows how to bypass it. A full set creates a barrier against infection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_ches: Every piece is the skin of a creature that came to kill you. Now it protects.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_legg: Flexible protection from Swarm biomaterial. A full set blocks spores from below.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_boot: You walk on infected ground in boots made from the skin of its creators. The irony doesn't help.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_sword: The nibirium blade cuts Swarm armor like paper. Every strike ripples outward to nearby enemies.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_pickaxe: Strikes in three dimensions at once. Miners call it cheating. They survive.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_axe: Capable of felling what shouldn't burn and shouldn't fall. It fells.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_shovel: Digs cubic meters per second. Or builds a shelter before the Swarm arrives.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_hoe: Tills the soil with military precision.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infected_water_bu: Looks wrong. In practice — harmless. Just a different color.
tooltip.alien-invasion.sky_drone_spawn_e: There is no hiding in the sky. The drone hunts by the heat of living things.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cave_lurker_spawn: The mines are no longer safe. It waits in the dark.
tooltip.alien-invasion.acid_spitter_spaw: Acid charges dissolve armor faster than you can retreat.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_shard: Shimmers like a galaxy in your palm. The highest currency of the new world.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_ingot: Molten cosmos in ingot form. An army built from this metal would be unbeatable.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_battery: A Swarm energy cell. One charge keeps a turret running through the entire night.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_serum: A biological syringe made from the Swarm's own materials — used against it. Fully purges infection and radiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.weak_antidote: A crude antidote made from alien flesh. Holds infection at early stages.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_blade: Grown from Swarm biomass. It drinks blood like a living thing. Every strike infects — the wound won't heal.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_stimulant: Overdrive. The body instantly recovers and enters combat mode. No side effects recorded so far.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_grappling_hoo: A living grapple from Swarm organics. Pulls you to blocks — or enemies to you. The choice is always yours.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_warhammer: Two fists in one strike. The ground cracks, enemies scatter.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_pickaxe: Stone no longer resists. Just press — and it's gone.
tooltip.alien-invasion.star_cleaver: Born in the void. Every strike ripples outward to everyone standing nearby.
tooltip.alien-invasion.blink_core: Space is no obstacle. Teleport nine blocks forward, speed and protection included.
tooltip.alien-invasion.comms_beacon: Broadcasts your coordinates to allies worldwide. Use it while there's still someone to answer.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_pickaxe: Senses ore through stone. Glows when something valuable is nearby.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_axe: One strike at the base — and the entire tree falls. The Swarm respects efficiency.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_shovel: Digs a shoulder-width trench in a single sweep.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_hoe: Plows a field and sows seeds in one pass. The land resists — briefly.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gravity_gun: Taken from a Telekinetic alien. Now you can hurl its allies back into them.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_blaster: Captured Swarm weapon, reprogrammed for human hands. Thirty plasma shots per magazine.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_cell: One click — full magazine. Store away from heat sources.
tooltip.alien-invasion.rally_banner: A raised banner — the signal to fight. Regeneration, protection, speed and absorption for everyone nearby.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gravity_grenade: Everything in range will suddenly want to meet at one point. Step back first.
tooltip.alien-invasion.purifier_wand: A ray of hope in an infected world. Returns blocks to life — slowly, but surely.
tooltip.alien-invasion.invasion_tracker: Rebuilt from UFO wreckage. Finds Swarm structures, ores and enemies through solid rock.
tooltip.alien-invasion.emp_grenade: An electromagnetic pulse in your hand. UFOs cut out. Drills stop. Power suits go dark.
tooltip.alien-invasion.herbal_salve: An old recipe for a new world. The herbs don't know things have changed — and keep healing.
tooltip.alien-invasion.parasite_item: A Swarm neural parasite. Attaches to the skull and takes full control of the nervous system. Keep away from your head.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_alloy: A biometal alloy — hard as basalt, alive as muscle. The foundation of organic weaponry.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hive_core: The living heart of the Hive. While it beats in your hands — there may still be someone nearby you can save.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_flesh: Infected meat feeds the body. What it does to the mind — better not to test.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_grunt_spawn: The first of them appeared at dawn. Organized, silent, purposeful.
tooltip.alien-invasion.telekinetic_alien: The stones move on their own. It's not an illusion — it's telekinesis.
tooltip.alien-invasion.ufo_spawn_egg: The beam takes without warning. None of those taken have returned.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_brute_spawn: The Swarm's heavy infantry. Armor for two, fury for an entire squad.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_chicken_spa: The Swarm's mark is a death sentence. This chicken hands them out.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hive_tyrant_spawn: The Hive's commander. His presence lights up the Geiger counter and extinguishes morale.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_troll_spawn: It doesn't kill you right away. It steals everything — then watches what you'll do.
tooltip.alien-invasion.drill_spawn_egg: Something is buzzing underfoot. The Swarm is digging toward you.
tooltip.alien-invasion.parasite_spawn_eg: Leaps. Latches. Controls. The attempts to resist grow weaker.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_stalker_spa: In the dark — only eyes. Then — nothing.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_caster_spa: Fire rain without warning. Keep your distance.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hive_shaman_spawn: It heals its own. It accelerates its own. Kill it first — before it's too late.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_breacher_sp: Walls are no obstacle. It remembers where you are and digs straight.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_player_c: Your face. Your armor. But inside — only the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_creeper_: It explodes — and leaves behind not a crater, but an acid pool.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_skeleton: Every arrow carries a radiation dose. The Geiger counter won't quiet down.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_zombie_s: A chitin growth on the chest blocks frontal strikes. Flank it.
tooltip.alien-invasion.swarm_mother_spaw: The source. The beginning. The end. She has been waiting since day one.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hazmat_helmet.1: A dual-filter mask. The air outside isn't what it was.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hazmat_chestplate: A full set is the only reliable defense against the Swarm's radiation fields.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hazmat_boots.1: Rubber soles insulate from infected soil.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_helmet.1: Blocks the Swarm's psionic signals. The voices in your head go quiet.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_helmet.2: Full set: complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_chestplate: Fused with star metal. Nothing earthly can touch it.
Full set: complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_leggings.1: Passed through the heart of a star. Nothing is more durable.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_leggings.2: Full set: complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_boots.1: You step on infected ground — it retreats.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_boots.2: Full set: complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_helmet.2: Cheaper than it looks — and tougher than it appears.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_chestplate: Grown in the Hive's biomass — turned against it.
A full set removes poison, infection and hunger.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_leggings.1: Flexible as muscle. Hard as bone.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_boots.1: Silent and light — the Swarm won't hear your footsteps.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gravity_boots: Telekinetic alien technology turned against its makers. Double jump, levitation, no fall damage.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_block: Compressed cosmic ingots. Nothing is stronger. Even an explosion will only leave a scratch.
tooltip.alien-invasion.purifier: Slowly returns infected blocks to normal. Requires a battery. Requires time. But the infection retreats.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_turret: Automated perimeter defense. Charge with batteries, place at the entrance — and sleep soundly.
tooltip.alien-invasion.swarm_beacon: The Swarm Mother's summoning beacon. Activate on the eighth day — only if you're sure you're ready.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hive: An organic command node. Every night soldiers emerge from it. Destroy it — and the area grows quieter.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_residue: Living slime slowly rewriting the environment to Swarm standards.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_stone: Stone that became part of the biomass. The Swarm uses it as a building material.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_grass: Purple spores on a green background. The land stops being yours — literally underfoot.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_log: The tree still stands. But inside it's no longer a tree — Swarm spores have grown through it.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_leaves: Crumbles into toxic fumes when touched. Don't inhale.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_crystal: Cosmic Crystal Ore. Rapidly fills the Infection bar on approach — the closer you get, the faster it rises. Aliens are immune.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_ore: Radioactive ore with a signature never before seen on Earth. The Swarm brought it from far away.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_beacon: While the beacon stands — the Swarm knows where you are. The orbital strike won't be long.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_stash: The Swarm collects what it considers valuable. Judging by the contents — much of it matches your own opinion.
tooltip.alien-invasion.radiation_crystal: A cluster of crystals. Beautiful and deadly — like almost everything the Swarm brought.
tooltip.alien-invasion.contaminated_bone: Bones saturated with biomass. The Swarm doesn't leave its dead simply lying around.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_sword: Sluggish like the metal itself, but holds its edge longer than any blade. Built to last — as long as the Swarm keeps coming.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_pickaxe: Slow, stubborn, reliable. Ore veins give way to platinum — as does anything that stands too long.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_axe: A heavy blade of white metal. Strikes infrequently — but always decisively.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_shovel: Digs with dignity. The tool of those who build bunkers rather than flee from them.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_hoe: Contaminated soil resists. Platinum does not.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_sword: Fast and brutal. Cuts without hesitation. For those who act first and think second.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_pickaxe: Faster than diamond. The ore doesn't have time to understand what happened.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_axe: A swift strike — and the tree falls before its shadow does. Durability isn't infinite, but it's enough.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_shovel: Digs so fast the earth doesn't have time to settle back.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_hoe: Quick, precise, no ceremony. The soil is ready before the next attack begins.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hazmat_helm: A light chemical protection suit. Seals the pores — spores and radiation penetrate far slower.
Full set: Infection and Irradiation accumulate three times slower.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hazmat_ches: A sealed rubber-lined chestplate. The first barrier against biological threats.
Full set: Infection and Irradiation accumulate three times slower.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hazmat_legg: Reinforced leggings. Prevent spores from penetrating through the skin.
Full set: Infection and Irradiation accumulate three times slower.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hazmat_boot: Rubber soles insulate from infected soil and ambient radiation.
Full set: Infection and Irradiation accumulate three times slower.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_chem_helmet: A reinforced nibirium helmet. Neutralizes ionizing radiation and the Swarm's biological vectors.
Full set: Infection and Irradiation accumulate five times slower.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_chem_chestp: Multi-layer armor treated with nibirium. It holds against everything the Swarm throws at humanity.
Full set: Infection and Irradiation accumulate five times slower.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_chem_leggin: Leggings with a nibirium coating. The Swarm attacks — the chem armor doesn't let through.
Full set: Infection and Irradiation accumulate five times slower.
Reinforced soles. Walk on infected ground and barely notice.
Full set: Infection and Irradiation accumulate five times slower.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_helmet.2: Full set: Irradiation accumulates at half speed and cannot exceed 70%.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_chestpla: Platinum plates fused under pressure. The Swarm doesn't know about its shielding properties. We do.
Full set: Irradiation accumulates at half speed and cannot exceed 70%.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_leggings: Its cold sheen deflects more than light — it scatters dosimetric waves.
Full set: Irradiation accumulates at half speed and cannot exceed 70%.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_boots.1: Walks on irradiated ground without absorbing dose.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_boots.2: Full set: Irradiation accumulates at half speed and cannot exceed 70%.
Palladium blocks the Swarm's biological vectors.
Full set: Infection accumulates at half speed and cannot exceed 70%.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_chestpl: Tougher than iron, lighter than steel. The Swarm mined it for their own ends — now it serves against them.
Full set: Infection accumulates at half speed and cannot exceed 70%.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_legging: Protection for those who push forward.
Full set: Infection accumulates at half speed and cannot exceed 70%.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_boots.1: The feet take the first hit. Spores don't pass through palladium.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_boots.2: Full set: Infection accumulates at half speed and cannot exceed 70%.
upgrade.alien-invasion.nibirium.base_slo: Add a diamond tool, weapon, or Hazmat Suit piece
